scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:supabase && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:db: cd backend && docker compose up db -d --wait
scripts.dev:services: concurrently --kill-others --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend/src/Kalandra.Api && cross-env Auth__SupabaseProjectUrl=http://localhost:54321 Auth__SupabaseJwtSecret=super-secret-jwt-token-with-at-least-32-characters-long dotnet watch run
scripts.dev:stop: cd backend && docker compose down && npx supabase stop
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:supabase && cd frontend && npm run build && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names backend,serve,test "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5000/health && cd frontend && npx serve dist -l 4321" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5000/health && npx wait-on http://localhost:4321 && cd frontend && npx playwright test --config playwright.e2e.config.ts"
